message:
Merge: fix: stabilize flaky TestRunBdCmd_ReturnsStdoutOnNonZeroAndTimeout (gt-5kjn)

Fixes flaky test by: (1) adding configurable bdBin field to LiveConvoyFetcher
instead of mutating PATH with t.Setenv, (2) using 'exec sleep' to prevent
orphan child processes, (3) increasing timeouts from 20-30ms to 200ms for
stability under load. Also splits into subtests.

Branch: polecat/nux/gt-5kjn@mm5i1uxe (rebased onto main)
MR: gt-wisp-mvpf

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,11 @@ func (f *LiveConvoyFetcher) runBdCmd(beadsDir string, args ...string) (*bytes.Bu
 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), f.cmdTimeout)
 	defer cancel()
 
-	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "bd", args...)
+	bin := f.bdBin
+	if bin == "" {
+		bin = "bd"
+	}
+	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, bin, args...)
 	cmd.Dir = beadsDir
 	var stdout bytes.Buffer
 	cmd.Stdout = &stdout
@@ -73,6 +77,9 @@ type LiveConvoyFetcher struct {
 	townRoot  string
 	townBeads string
 
+	// bdBin is the bd binary name or path. Defaults to "bd" if empty.
+	bdBin string
+
 	// Configurable timeouts (from TownSettings.WebTimeouts)
 	cmdTimeout     time.Duration
 	ghCmdTimeout   time.Duration
